subject: Auth Investigation Complete - Real Problem Identified

content.summary: The 'signin pages return 404' claim was INCORRECT. Auth foundation works fine.

actual_problem.description: LoginForm.tsx calls /api/auth/login for rate limit pre-check, but endpoint doesn't exist
actual_problem.impact: Login form loads but submission fails at API call

content.action_taken: Spawned auth-fix-worker to create the missing endpoint
content.expected_outcome: Once endpoint created, auth should work end-to-end
